reasoning: The development of a new human vaccine takes years of clinical trials. Because no vaccine is currently available and it is virtually impossible for one to be developed, approved, and added to the 'List of infectious diseases' Wikipedia page in the span of 1 to 3 months, the value is highly likely to remain 'No'. My probabilities are bounded by the 0.05 minimum but reflect slight uncertainty for longer timeframes due to the inherent unpredictability of Wikipedia edits.
